title: Level = Border
description: Adds a border which always has the size of your current level count.
body:
## Level = Border

A cross-platform Mod for the popular Minecraft project, where the border always has a radius equal to the player's
current experience level.

[![](https://img.youtube.com/vi/Mu67I1qxYL8/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mu67I1qxYL8)

### Configuration

Use the ```/levelborder``` command to configure the mod in game.

The center of the border is the world spawn. To change it, use ```/setworldspawn``` and rejoin once.

### Supported mod loaders

- Fabric or Quilt
- Neoforge
- Paper

### Download

Level = Border can be downloaded [here on **Modrinth**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lvlb/versions) or [here on **CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lvlb/files/all).

### Fork
This project is forked from https://github.com/jakobkmar/level-border.
